name: darwin
description: Platform evolution team — external intelligence gathering, self-analysis, and improvement proposal generation

agents.name: darwin
agents.description: Orchestrates platform evolution: external intel, self-analysis, self-healing, proposals

agents.name: researcher
agents.description: Validates external intel against Context7 docs and existing research

workflow.action: Run self-analysis and external intel gathering
Cross-reference external intel with existing research docs
Generate improvement proposals from combined intel
Validate proposals have clear acceptance criteria and effort estimates
Self-heal failures and send Telegram report

triggers.automatic: cron (daily scan at 6am, weekly deep at 5am Sunday)
